## Summary

Describe the scoped change and affected routes.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `npm run audit:prod`
- [ ] Keyboard navigation checked
- [ ] Focus states checked
- [ ] 320px, 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px, and 1920px layouts reviewed when applicable
- [ ] No unapproved colors, fonts, icons, or brand asset modifications
- [ ] No unnecessary client JavaScript
- [ ] No broken internal links

## Compatibility and security

Describe backward-compatibility and security impact.
